productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Club Poplin White Shirts
description: Composition White full sleeves shirt made of 100% cotton, has an embroidered brand badge on the left chest, embroidery on the upper back and full front buttoned placket Fitting Slim Wash care Hand/machine wash in cold water with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron If you are bored of t-shirts try this white casual shirt from indigo nation for your weekend parties. It's not just a smart shirt; the embroidery at the back reads “Spitfire”, the British fighter aircraft. Look ruggedly handsome, and pay your respects to the World War 2 airplane. Team it with jeans and casual shoes for a chilled out look. Model statistics The model wears size 40 in shirts Height: 6; Shoulders: 18
